title: Labels for tasks on a gantt chart need to have an option to "center" them on the depicted task.
excerpt: The labels for tasks in a Gantt chart are currently placed to the right of the task. This is confusing because it gives the false impression that the label is for the dependency line that also comes off the right side of…

posts.author: Brodog (Robert Wright)
posts.cookedHtml:
The labels for tasks in a Gantt chart are currently placed to the right of the task. This is confusing because it gives the false impression that the label is for the dependency line that also comes off the right side of the task.
I would like a user option to center the label on the task (either above or superimposed).
